memory_candidates.content: When porting a monolithic logic library (like BimodalLogic) into cslib's modular architecture, classify each source component by which connective operators it uses (atom/bot/imp only = propositional, adds box = modal, adds untl/snce = temporal, uses all = bimodal). This operator-usage classification maps directly to the typeclass signature the component should carry ([PropositionalHilbert S], [ModalS5Hilbert S], [TemporalBXHilbert S], [BimodalTMHilbert S]) and determines which standalone module it belongs in. Components using only lower-level operators must be extracted to the corresponding standalone module to avoid forcing consumers to import the full bimodal theory.
